question:
Consider the convex quadratically constrained quadratic program over x in R^3:
Minimize (1/2) x^T Q_0 x + c_0^T x
subject to x^T Q_i x + c_i^T x <= d_i for i=1..2,
and ||x||_2^2 <= 29.697.

Q_0 = [[9, 6, -6], [6, 7, -5], [-6, -5, 7]]
c_0 = [-1, 2, -3]
Q_1 = [[6.5, 3, 3], [3, 5.5, 0], [3, 0, 6.5]], c_1 = [-2, -2, 1], d_1 = 19.0
Q_2 = [[9.5, 2, -6], [2, 4.5, -4], [-6, -4, 8.5]], c_2 = [3, -2, 2], d_2 = 56.0

What is the minimum value of the objective (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the convex quadratically constrained quadratic program over x in R^2:
Minimize (1/2) x^T Q_0 x + c_0^T x
subject to x^T Q_i x + c_i^T x <= d_i for i=1..1,
and ||x||_2^2 <= 27.416.

Q_0 = [[3, -2], [-2, 5]]
c_0 = [1, -1]
Q_1 = [[1.5, -2], [-2, 8.5]], c_1 = [-1, 0], d_1 = 44.5

What is the minimum value of the objective (rounded to 3 decimals)?

Consider the convex quadratically constrained quadratic program over x in R^2:
Minimize (1/2) x^T Q_0 x + c_0^T x
subject to x^T Q_i x + c_i^T x <= d_i for i=1..1,
and ||x||_2^2 <= 16.0.

Q_0 = [[6, -2], [-2, 9]]
c_0 = [2, 1]
Q_1 = [[5.5, 4], [4, 4.5]], c_1 = [2, -2], d_1 = 7.5

What is the minimum value of the objective (rounded to 3 decimals)?
